archetype_description: Swiss & High-Contrast (Apple-style geometry) mixed with warm organic colors of Munchy's Grill

components.navbar: glassmorphism, sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40
components.button: rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2
components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-border/40
components.modal: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/90 rounded-3xl border border-white/50 shadow-2xl
components.input: rounded-xl border-border/40 bg-white px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent transition-all

animations.scroll: Use framer-motion for fade-in-up with 0.5s duration and 0.2s stagger on children. Sections should reveal smoothly as users scroll (Apple-style).
animations.hover: Magnetic hover on buttons, slight scale (1.02) on item cards. Nav links should have a subtle underline reveal.
animations.parallax: Use scroll-triggered slight y-axis transform for hero images and section backgrounds to create cinematic depth.
animations.drawer: Cart drawer slides in from the right with a spring physics (stiffness 300, damping 30), fading the background overlay.

layout_blueprint.hero: Cinematic full-width image with dark gradient overlay at bottom. Large Fraunces headline, glassmorphism CTA card floating. Text aligned carefully to maintain optical balance.
layout_blueprint.featured_items: Horizontal scroll or asymmetrical bento grid. Large imagery with minimalistic typography overlay.
layout_blueprint.full_menu_grid: Apple-style bento grid for categories. Clean, rectangular cards for items with high-res food photography on top, content below. Explicitly NO EMOJIS in category names or descriptions.
layout_blueprint.item_modal: Centered glassmorphism overlay. High-res item photo on top half (or left side on desktop), deep customization form (radio/checkboxes for toppings/sauces) on bottom/right.
layout_blueprint.cart_drawer: Slide-in from right. Blur backdrop. Minimalist line-items. Sticky checkout button at the bottom.
layout_blueprint.about_story: Asymmetric split layout. Large portrait photo on left, deep typography on right. Generous whitespace (p-24).
layout_blueprint.location_hours: Clean text-based layout with a high-contrast map visual. Information hierarchically structured.
layout_blueprint.footer: Dark charcoal background (foreground color), light cream text. Large brand mark at text-[10vw]. Massive padding (py-32).

media.description: Delicious falafel shawarma wrap with crispy fries served on a plate in Santa Monica.
A vibrant Middle Eastern dish with falafel, kebabs, tabbouleh on a plate.
Warm restaurant interior filled with tables and chairs

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid emojis in all text, titles, buttons, and descriptions.

Implement glassmorphism accents heavily on the nav, modal dialogs, and cart drawer using backdrop-blur and semi-transparent white backgrounds with a subtle border. NEVER use pure transparent backgrounds for overlays.
Ensure Apple-style geometric precision: crisp lines, perfect alignment, high-contrast typography sizes, and generous padding.
Implement scroll-triggered cinematic animations using framer-motion (fade-in, slide-up, magnetic hovers) across all major sections.
Merge the marketing site features (About, Location, Story) smoothly with the functional ordering features (Cart, Checkout, Customization).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use standard semantic HTML elements combined with heavily customized Shadcn UI components for functional parts (Modals, Forms, Inputs).
Apply the HSL color variables correctly in Tailwind config and use them for the entire layout. The theme is Light, with warm ivory backgrounds and charcoal text.
